function App() {
  const [time, setTime] = React.useState(0);
  const [isRunning, setIsRunning] = React.useState(false);
  const [inputMinutes, setInputMinutes] = React.useState("");

  React.useEffect(() => {
    let interval;
    if (isRunning && time > 0) {
      interval = setInterval(() => {
        setTime((prev) => {
          if (prev <= 1) {
            setIsRunning(false);
            return 0;
          }
          return prev - 1;
        });
      }, 1000);
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [isRunning, time]);

  const handleStart = () => {
    if (time > 0) {
      setIsRunning(true);
    }
  };

  const handlePause = () => {
    setIsRunning(false);
  };

  const handleReset = () => {
    setIsRunning(false);
    setTime(0);
    setInputMinutes("");
  };

  const handleSetTime = () => {
    const minutes = parseInt(inputMinutes, 10);
    if (minutes > 0) {
      setTime(minutes * 60);
      setInputMinutes("");
    }
  };

  const formatTime = (seconds) => {
    const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
    const secs = seconds % 60;
    return `${String(mins).padStart(2, "0")}:${String(secs).padStart(2, "0")}`;
  };

  const handleKeyPress = (e) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter") {
      handleSetTime();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        minHeight: "100vh",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "center",
        backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
        fontFamily: '"Segoe UI", Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif',
        padding: "20px",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
          borderRadius: "16px",
          padding: "40px 30px",
          boxShadow: "0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
          textAlign: "center",
          maxWidth: "400px",
          width: "100%",
        }}
      >
        <h1
          style={{
            color: "var(--color-text)",
            fontSize: "28px",
            marginBottom: "30px",
            fontWeight: "600",
            letterSpacing: "0.5px",
          }}
        >
          Timer
        </h1>

        <div
          style={{
            fontSize: "64px",
            fontWeight: "700",
            color: "var(--color-accent)",
            marginBottom: "30px",
            fontFamily: '"Courier New", monospace",
            letterSpacing: "2px",
          }}
        >
          {formatTime(time)}
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            gap: "10px",
            marginBottom: "25px",
          }}
        >
          <input
            type="number"
            value={inputMinutes}
            onChange={(e) => setInputMinutes(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={handleKeyPress}
            placeholder="Enter minutes"
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: "10px 12px",
              border: `2px solid var(--color-accent)`,
              borderRadius: "6px",
              fontSize: "14px",
              backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
              color: "var(--color-text)",
              outline: "none",
              transition: "border-color 0.3s",
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSetTime}
            style={{
              padding: "10px 16px",
              backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)",
              color: "white",
              border: "none",
              borderRadius: "6px",
              cursor: "pointer",
              fontWeight: "600",
              fontSize: "14px",
              transition: "opacity 0.2s",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => (e.target.style.opacity = "0.8")}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => (e.target.style.opacity = "1")}
          >
            Set
          </button>
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            gap: "10px",
            justifyContent: "center",
            flexWrap: "wrap",
          }}
        >
          <button
            onClick={handleStart}
            disabled={time === 0 || isRunning}
            style={{
              padding: "12px 24px",
              backgroundColor: isRunning || time === 0 ? "#ccc" : "var(--color-accent)",
              color: "white",
              border: "none",
              borderRadius: "6px",
              cursor: isRunning || time === 0 ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
              fontWeight: "600",
              fontSize: "14px",
              transition: "opacity 0.2s",
              opacity: isRunning || time === 0 ? 0.5 : 1,
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              if (time > 0 && !isRunning) e.target.style.opacity = "0.8";
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              if (time > 0 && !isRunning) e.target.style.opacity = "1";
            }}
          >
            Start
          </button>

          <button
            onClick={handlePause}
            disabled={!isRunning}
            style={{
              padding: "12px 24px",
              backgroundColor: !isRunning ? "#ccc" : "var(--color-accent)",
              color: "white",
              border: "none",
              borderRadius: "6px",
              cursor: isRunning ? "pointer" : "not-allowed",
              fontWeight: "600",
              fontSize: "14px",
              transition: "opacity 0.2s",
              opacity: !isRunning ? 0.5 : 1,
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              if (isRunning) e.target.style.opacity = "0.8";
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              if (isRunning) e.target.style.opacity = "1";
            }}
          >
            Pause
          </button>

          <button
            onClick={handleReset}
            style={{
              padding: "12px 24px",
              backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)",
              color: "white",
              border: "none",
              borderRadius: "6px",
              cursor: "pointer",
              fontWeight: "600",
              fontSize: "14px",
              transition: "opacity 0.2s",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => (e.target.style.opacity = "0.8")}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => (e.target.style.opacity = "1")}
          >
            Reset
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
